description: This episode of the Solana Changelog discusses recent developer updates, including the conclusion of a game jam with over 230 registrations and 22 submitted games, improvements in developer tooling, and the launch of a developer educator program. Notable updates include the introduction of a transaction receipt route to enhance light client verification.
topic_summary: Highlights from the Solana Changelog, including game jam results [t=11:48], tooling advancements [t=66:03], and the developer educator program [t=100:36].
